name: Seedance Wizard
author: Seedance Team
description: AI-powered video creation wizard for Seedance 2.0. Chat with DeepSeek AI director, analyze reference images, adjust CSS filters in real-time, generate Flux previews, and export videos directly in ComfyUI.

nodes.SeedanceWizardNode: Main wizard node — polls for video completion and outputs the downloaded video file path
nodes.SeedanceApiKeyNode: Optional standalone API key input node
